parsed_review.summary: CP00-748 (RP24.P07.M04.S13-RP24.P07.M06.S08, Risk B, 40 units, descriptor-only Korean Legal Depth P07 permission fixture bridge) passes independent read-only review. PROVENANCE: I inspected all source/artifacts directly via Read/Grep/Glob; I did NOT re-execute validation commands (read-only reviewer), so the exit-0 results in command-evidence.json are reported-by-pack but corroborated by my direct source inspection. VERIFIED: (1) Baseline/manifest/registry binding/contract latest_projection/plan-queue all agree — live_latest_pack_id CP00-748, cursor advances to CP00-749/RP24.P07.M06.S09. (2) Deliverable distribution (failure_recovery:20, implementation:4, hermes_evidence:4, fixture:2, test:4, security_audit:4, claude_review:2 = 40) and micro-title counts (10/22/8) match across baseline, KOREAN_LEGAL_CP748_REQUIREMENTS, and validator logic; the 22-element failure-workflow row array slices (M04 slice(12)=10, M05 full=22, M06 slice(0,8)=8) map correctly to all 40 unit titles. (3) createDescriptor/createCaseSet hard-code descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, all *_runtime_opened:false, no raw/legal/credential/client payloads; ROW_EXTRAS never set a prohibited flag true. (4) validators.js enforces program/upstream IDs, human-approval-required-for-runtime, claude-not-final, no enterprise-trust claim, no Korean-legal runtime, no permission-decision/cross-tenant/audit-body leakage, Hermes/Claude gates, handoff and contract-projection drift. (5) model.test.js covers CP748 binding+coverage, descriptor runtime-closed (runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-749, hermes emits_runtime_receipt:false, claude read_only:true), and contract latest projection. (6) Hermes used only for descriptor-only evidence packets, not product runtime; index.js re-exports all 6 required public exports. (7) Review-hardening: readiness auth-preflight passed with well-formed non-zero JSON, claude-review-result has no invalid attempts laundered as valid and no prior receipts, validation-report confirms no forbidden tools / prompt within size / nothing omitted. Pack state is honestly PENDING (production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false; adjudication 0 P0/P1/P2) awaiting this gating review — the expected pre-review state, not an unresolved blocker. Authority boundary intact: Claude is a read-only non-final reviewer; runtime/enterprise-trust opening is correctly deferred to human approval and is outside this receipt. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; nothing blocks pack or this-CP goal closeout.
